title: docs: regenerate APIDOCS.md
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Auto-generated from OpenAPI spec changes after a successful production deploy.

gist.headline: Fresh Docs Delivered
gist.blurb: The API documentation has been automatically synced with the latest OpenAPI specifications.
gist.summary: Automated regeneration of APIDOCS.md to sync with the latest OpenAPI spec changes following a production deploy.
gist.impact: Developers reading the API documentation will see the most up-to-date endpoint specifications.
gist.visual_concept: The robot companion printing a fresh page of documentation while Polly the bee reads it, representing automated documentation updates.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head printing a fresh page of code documentation. The tiny bee mascot hovers nearby wearing reading glasses. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
